name: ar-agents-whatsapp-hello
description: Demo: WhatsApp Business Cloud + Identity + MercadoPago combined billing assistant. Demonstrates the @ar-agents/whatsapp + @ar-agents/identity + @ar-agents/mercadopago packages end-to-end. Not a productive sociedad-IA.
note: Single-library demo. Does NOT claim RFC-004 conformance — no audit-log endpoints (no /api/play/audit). Cite-by-reference to the reference implementation at ar-agents.vercel.app for the full RFC-004 surface.
